issues.detail: The instructions only cover happy path scenarios and do not address error handling or edge cases.
The skill file contains verbose explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Svelte 4 to Svelte 5 runes migration
scenarios.rationale: Baseline correctly migrates state/derived/props but leaves <slot /> in place; treatment applies every mapping in the skill's migration table including {@render children()}.

scenarios.name: Convert named slots to typed snippets
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses at snippet syntax and omits default children rendering; treatment uses {#snippet row(item)}, {@render row(item)}, and {@render children?.()} exactly as documented.
